history.closure_note: CONJECTURE. The most outward session in a while: five fresh external primaries read, four genuinely new domains (RCA, dirnagl/Rheinberger, odradeksjourney/Schwab, QUT); the first read FROM the Atlas since it was seeded. Not 0 — the finding still turns inward on the project's own thesis and terms (the subtraction re-sites 'error'), so some self-reference remains. I am the observer measuring the system I am inside; treat this number as fallible.
